parameter.name: contents
parameter.value: [{"parts":[{"text":"Apply nano-banana style transfer to this image with style: {{$node['Style Config'].json.style}}","inline_data":{"mime_type":"{{$binary.data.mimeType}}","data":"{{$binary.data.data}}"}}]}]

parameters.content:
## Nano-Banana Style Transfer Workflow

### Configuration Required:
1. Update folder IDs in "Define Style Folders" node
2. Configure Google Drive OAuth credentials
3. Configure Google Gemini API credentials
4. Adjust style parameters as needed

### Workflow Process:
1. Reads style configurations (multiple folders)
2. For each style folder:
   - Lists all images
   - Downloads each image
   - Applies nano-banana style transfer via GEMINI
   - Uploads styled images to output folder
3. Groups and reports results by style

### Notes:
- Processes images in batches to avoid rate limits
- Each style has separate input/output folders
- Results are grouped for easy monitoring
